display.anion.attractor.0: This Attractor is charged with %s Shockies.
display.anion.attractor.1.has_hopper: This Attractor will pick up nearby dropped items and deposit them in the Hopper below.
display.anion.attractor.1.no_hopper: Place a Hopper below this Attractor for it to begin attracting dropped items.
display.anion.volteater.1: Interact with a Battery to transfer the electricity.
